items.title: TamboUI Promises to Bring Better Capabilities to Build TUIs in Java
items.summaryShort: TamboUI Promises to Bring Better Capabilities to Build TUIs in Java. The call to action, “to make 2026 the year of Java in the terminal,” was quickly responded to by the launch of TamboUI.

items.title: Ghost hackers: the cybersecurity mystery that nobody has solved
items.summaryShort: Ghost hackers: the cybersecurity mystery that nobody has solved. A shadowy group that stole and dumped the NSA’s most powerful hacking tools still has implications for how companies think about digital risk today.

items.title: Iranian hackers blamed for breach of Los Angeles transit system that took weeks to recover
items.summaryShort: Iranian hackers blamed for breach of Los Angeles transit system that took weeks to recover. An Israeli cybersecurity firm said Iran’s government is behind Ababil of Minab, a fake hacktivist persona that has claimed a series of data breaches
